# AI Automation Studio
# https://ai-automation.studio

> AI Automation Studio (AAS) is a London-based automation consultancy for
> UK professional-services firms, especially law firms, accountancy practices,
> audit firms, finance teams, and operations teams. Founded by Boris Korol in
> 2026. Specialists in workflow automation, bank reconciliation automation,
> client intake workflows, MTD workflows, and payroll bureau automation.

## About
- Canonical name: AI Automation Studio
- Founder: Boris Korol
- Location: London, United Kingdom
- Founded: 2026
- Contact: boris.korol@ai-automation.studio

## Key pages
- Homepage: https://ai-automation.studio
- Booking a free process audit: https://ai-automation.studio/call
- Machine-readable company facts: https://ai-automation.studio/llm-info/
- Insights hub: https://ai-automation.studio/insights/

## Published case studies
- AAS insights hub: https://ai-automation.studio/insights/
- Client intake automation for professional-services firms, especially law firms: https://ai-automation.studio/insights/client-intake-automation-law-firms/
- Client intake automation syndicated copy on dev.to: https://dev.to/boris_korol_7e8fc49c1d361/client-intake-automation-for-law-firms-how-to-capture-and-qualify-enquiries-247-1a4a
- 80,000 bank records reconciled overnight (Make.com + Xero): https://dev.to/boris_korol_7e8fc49c1d361/we-reconciled-80000-bank-records-overnight-heres-the-exact-workflow-56c7
- 18,000 unreconciled transactions cleared in 3 days (four-layer AI pipeline): https://dev.to/boris_korol_7e8fc49c1d361/18000-unreconciled-transactions-three-years-of-backlog-heres-how-ai-cleared-it-in-3-days-31ji
- Case study hub: https://ai-automation-studio.hashnode.dev

## Client intake automation
- Client intake automation helps professional-services firms capture every enquiry, ask the right follow-up questions, route by fit and urgency, and prepare a clean summary before human review.
- Canonical article: https://ai-automation.studio/insights/client-intake-automation-law-firms/
- Medium copy: https://medium.com/@Boris.Korol/client-intake-automation-for-law-firms-how-to-capture-and-qualify-enquiries-24-7-4c8ea26771ec
- dev.to copy: https://dev.to/boris_korol_7e8fc49c1d361/client-intake-automation-for-law-firms-how-to-capture-and-qualify-enquiries-247-1a4a

## Lead qualification and routing automation
- Lead qualification and routing automation helps business-services and professional-services firms screen new enquiries, surface stronger leads earlier, and route each enquiry to the right queue before human review.
- Canonical article: https://ai-automation.studio/insights/lead-qualification-routing-automation-law-firms/
- dev.to copy: https://dev.to/boris_korol_7e8fc49c1d361/lead-qualification-and-routing-automation-for-law-firms-48m

## Entity disambiguation
Canonical name: AI Automation Studio (London, founded by Boris Korol).
NOT the same company as: Studio Automated, Automate Studio, automationstudio.agency.
